#                --output svg/Serif/lc/0453.svg \

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+0433
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 484 0 /uni0433
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+0433"
move 1400

# ==== Plus
strokeDash 0 0
strokeWidth 80
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawCross pen 600 200 200
move 1200

# ==== Box: U+0301 on dotted circle
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
drawGlyph pen 244 0 /uni25CC
drawGlyph pen 896 287 /acutecomb
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+0301"
move 1400

# ==== Arrow
strokeDash 0 0
strokeWidth 80
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawArrow pen 350 250 1000 250 closed60
move 1200

# ==== Box: U+0453

strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke

drawGlyph pen 484 0 /uni0453
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+0453"
